message:
fix: correct secret source attribution + skeleton aria labels

secret-loader.service.ts:
- Fix resolveSecret() source attribution: previously reported "mapping"
  whenever a mapping entry existed for the tool, even if the mapped env
  var was unset and the value came from convention-based env lookup.
  Now checks that the mapped env var actually provided the value before
  attributing source as "mapping" vs "env".

skeletons/index.tsx:
- Fix NTMSkeleton aria-label from "Loading notifications" to "Loading
  NTM sessions" (NTM = Named Tmux Manager, not notifications)
- Fix CMSkeleton aria-label from "Loading memory insights" to "Loading
  credential manager" (CM = Credential Manager in this context)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
